3107020.name: Shadows of The Lost
3107020.description:
Shadows of The Lost is a dark fantasy soulslike meets ancient mythology which takes the genre to haunting new depths, blending momentum-based combat, a gripping story, and a unique companion system. Set in a fractured world corrupted by an otherworldly shadow, the ruins of once-great civilizations echo with the lingering power of demigods who forged deadly pacts with mortal rulers.

As a lone adventurer, traverse desolate landscapes shaped by twisted myths. From a dark fantasy style frostbitten ruins of Norse sagas to the cursed temples and battlefields of feudal Japan. Unearth relics tied to ancient powers, forge bonds with companions, and confront the creeping influence of the Shadows of The Lost.

Will you rise above the darkness to restore what was lost—or will you rule it?

Key Features:

Momentum-Based Combat: Successful attacks, parries, and last second blocks all build momentum. As your momentum grows, so does your combat potential. You lose momentum if you get hit or fail to capitalize fast enough. It’s all about rewarding skill and precision while keeping every encounter intense.

Challenging Combat: Engage in intense, skill-based combat where every encounter requires strategy, precision, and timing. 

Engaging Storytelling: Dive into a richly woven narrative that goes beyond traditional Soulslike storytelling. Experience a story filled with emotion, choices, and deeper connections to the world and its inhabitants. 

Companion System: Discover and recruit companions hidden throughout the world. These allies not only aid you in battle but bring unique skills, personalities, and their own backstories, adding depth to your journey. 

Immersive World: Explore a meticulously crafted dark fantasy realm filled with intricate lore and hauntingly beautiful environments. 

Deep Lore: Unravel the mysteries of a forgotten civilization through environmental storytelling, hidden items, and cryptic lore. 

Customization: Tailor your character's attributes to suit your playstyle, making each playthrough unique. 

Epic Boss Battles: Confront towering, nightmarish bosses that will test your combat prowess and determination. 

Stunning Visuals Powered by Unreal Engine 5: Experience breathtaking, high-fidelity graphics crafted in Unreal Engine, bringing the dark fantasy world to life with detailed environments, dynamic lighting, and atmospheric effects.

Prepare to venture into the shadows, uncover the lost secrets of a fallen civilization, and confront the darkness that lurks within.
3107020.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 繁体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
